use_cases: Primary call-to-action trigger for form submissions and confirmations
Interactive button for pricing plan selection and toggling
Navigation trigger for moving between pages or sections
Destructive action button for deletion or removal operations
Secondary option button for alternative user actions
ai_summary: A shadcn/ui Button component with CVA-based variant system supporting multiple visual styles including default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link variants. Features flexible sizing options and Radix UI Slot composition for render-as-child patterns. Designed for universal use as interactive action triggers in forms, navigation, and UI controls with proper focus states and accessibility support.
